title: elsota calophylla
intro: Elsota calophylla, also known as calophylla or wild calophylla, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Elsota calophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Elsota calophylla is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
